biography: Tommy, a familiar face from Espoo Ringside Golf, is known for his meticulous approach to the game and his unwavering dedication to improving his craft. While success in the Hector Trophée and Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, his three appearances stand as a testament to his commitment to this prestigious tournament.

Those who have the pleasure of knowing Tommy personally will attest to his jovial nature, which makes him a popular member of any team. His positive attitude is infectious, and he always brings a sense of camaraderie to the course.

Although Tommy is not currently slated to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, the possibility remains for a last-minute change. Should he decide to join, his experience and relentless pursuit of excellence would undoubtedly make him a formidable competitor.
